Get In Touch →

What We Do

Services

Four specialised practices.
One studio.

We don't offer everything — we offer the things we're exceptional at. Each practice is deep, not broad. Senior talent, strategic thinking, and craft at every level.

01
WebCanvas

Digital Design

End-to-end digital experiences — from the first wireframe to the final pixel. We design websites, apps, and product interfaces that are intuitive, accessible, and built to perform.

4–16 weeks →
02
CX&Identity

Branding & Identity

A brand is more than a logo. We build the full identity system — strategy, visual language, and the guidelines that keep it coherent as your company grows.

6–10 weeks →
03
CMF_Nexus

Product Design

From concept sketch to production-ready file. We blend design thinking with engineering rigour to develop products that look right, work right, and manufacture efficiently.

8–20 weeks →
04
Lumina.raw

Photo & Video

Visuals that stop the scroll. We produce photography and video content that tells your story with precision — from product shoots to brand films, edited and ready to publish.

1–6 weeks →

What's Included

WebCanvas Digital Design
  • Web design (marketing, product, landing pages)
  • App UI design (iOS & Android)
  • UX research & user journey mapping
  • Wireframes & interactive prototypes
  • Responsive design across all breakpoints
  • Developer handoff (Figma)
Full Practice →
CX&Identity Branding & Identity
  • Brand strategy & positioning
  • Logo system & wordmark
  • Type, colour & imagery system
  • Packaging design
  • Brand guidelines document
  • Launch assets & stationery
Full Practice →
CMF_Nexus Product Design
  • Concept sketches & ideation
  • CAD modelling & 3D design
  • CMF (colour, material, finish) specification
  • Prototyping & model making
  • Production-ready design files
  • Manufacture liaison support
Full Practice →
Lumina.raw Photo & Video
  • Product & campaign photography
  • Photo editing & retouching
  • Brand & documentary videography
  • Video editing & post-production
  • Social media content packages
  • Motion graphics
Full Practice →

Also From HS108

Our flagship retainer — an embedded design team that grows with your business.

Field Notes

Not sure what you need?

Start with a conversation.

Most projects don't fit neatly into one service. Tell us what you're building and we'll figure out the right scope together.
